name: Chicken with Fruit and Mixed Mustards
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium bowl, combine the Dijon, Bavarian, and Chinese mustards, honey, and light cream.
2. Place half of the mustard sauce in a large glass bowl.
3. Sprinkle salt and pepper on the chicken breasts.
4. Coat the chicken with the mustard sauce and place it in the bowl.
5. Refrigerate the chicken for 30 minutes, turning occasionally.
6. Melt margarine in a large frying pan over medium heat until foamy.
7. Add the marinated chicken to the pan and cook, turning, for about 7 minutes per side or until brown and tender.
8. Remove the chicken from the pan and slice it across the grain into thin pieces.
9. Arrange the chicken slices and fruit on a serving platter.
10. In a small saucepan, heat the reserved mustard sauce with mayonnaise until well combined.
11. Drizzle the sauce over the chicken.
12. Serve with the remaining sauce on the side. Garnish with parsley.
